ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed group */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed section */,
  "provisional_status" TEXT /* Provisional status of the breed (if applicable) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "history" TEXT /* Brief history of the breed */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Breed standard description */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight range of the breed */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height range of the breed */,
  "coat" TEXT /* Coat type of the breed */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Temperament of the breed */,
  "health" TEXT /* Health concerns of the breed */,
  "grooming" TEXT /* Grooming needs of the breed */,
  "exercise_needs" TEXT /* Exercise needs of the breed */,
  "family_friendly" INTEGER /* Family friendliness of the breed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the breed was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the breed was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeds_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeds_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Pointing Dogs, Terriers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group the section belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL entry */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the breed's official page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_urls_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdfs" (
  "pdf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDF entry */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL of the PDF document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the PDF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdfs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, breeder, general) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score (e.g., number of searches or views) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_popularity_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the breed */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed that was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who will receive the alert */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., update, new breed added) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_breeds" (
  "user_breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-breed entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_breeds_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_breeds_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_comments_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES breed_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the breed */,
  "searches" INTEGER /* Number of searches for the breed */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id")
)
